_comment: Offline MyMI activity sync snapshot keyed by pipelineId:sequence. Live generators read properties.sync from core.Activity instead. Rows with action starting with '_' are excluded.

definition.description: Runs the core metadata sync in one target transaction: FK NOCHECK, MERGE/DELETE from the compiled change set, re-enable FKs, commit.

step.title: Metadata sync
step.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected content scope.

definition.description: Runs core.uspObjectDependencies on target (@id, @objectName).
Runs the core metadata sync in one target transaction: FK NOCHECK, MERGE/DELETE from the compiled change set, re-enable FKs, commit.

step.title: Metadata sync
step.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected gate metadata scope.

definition.description: GET gate service /api/meta/refresh.
POST to agent /pipeline/start with pipeline name from step.

step.title: Pipeline start
step.description: Start the downstream gate refresh pipeline.

definition.description: Calls core.uspAuditRunCheck on source with action syncOrNot.

step.title: Audit check (before sync)
step.description: Source uspAuditRunCheck — decide whether metadata sync should run.

definition.description: Sets contract lock on source via core.uspSetContractLock (isLocked=true).

step.title: Target lock
step.description: Lock the target contract deployment window.

definition.description: Runs the core metadata sync in one target transaction: FK NOCHECK, MERGE/DELETE from the compiled change set, re-enable FKs, commit.

step.title: Metadata sync
step.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected contract scope.

definition.description: POST to agent /pipeline/register for contract pipeline subject.

step.title: Pipeline register
step.description: Register affected pipelines with the target agent service.

definition.description: Runs core.uspUndeployMarkedContract on target for the contract entity.

step.title: Contract undeploy
step.description: Undeploy the target contract before redeployment.

definition.description: Clears contract lock on source via core.uspSetContractLock (isLocked=false).
Calls core.uspAuditRunCheck on source with action syncOrNot.

step.title: Audit check (before deploy)
step.description: Re-run source audit after undeploy, before physical dataset creation.

definition.description: Sets contract lock on source via core.uspSetContractLock (isLocked=true).
Runs core.uspRunContractDeploymentScripts with action Run preScript.
Creates the contract stage dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=stage).
Creates the contract archive dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=archive).
Creates the contract list dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=list).
Creates the contract dim dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=dim).
Creates the contract fact dataset layer on the target via core.uspCreateDataset (@type=fact).
Runs core.uspCreateDatasetFKs after dataset layers exist.
Runs core.uspDeployETL2CustomTransformation for the contract on target.
Runs core.uspDeployRoutine for the contract on target.
Runs core.uspRunContractDeploymentScripts with action Run postScript.
Clears contract lock on source via core.uspSetContractLock (isLocked=false).
core.uspAuditRunCheck on source with action syncDate.
core.uspAuditRunCheck on target with action deployDate.
Runs the core metadata sync in one target transaction: FK NOCHECK, MERGE/DELETE from the compiled change set, re-enable FKs, commit.

step.title: Metadata sync
step.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected rule scope.

definition.description: POST to ETL service /dataset/deploy for the resolved subject.

step.title: Dataset deploy
step.description: Deploy datasets required by the rule on the target ETL service.

definition.description: POST to ETL service /rules/deploy with ruleId.

step.title: Rules deploy
step.description: Deploy the rule package on the target ETL service.

definition.description: core.uspAuditRunCheck on source with action syncDate.
core.uspAuditRunCheck on target with action deployDate.
Runs the core metadata sync in one target transaction: FK NOCHECK, MERGE/DELETE from the compiled change set, re-enable FKs, commit.

step.title: Metadata sync
step.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected dataset scope.

definition.description: POST to ETL service /dataset/deploy for the resolved subject.

step.title: Dataset deploy
step.description: Deploy the dataset using the target ETL service.

definition.description: core.uspAuditRunCheck on source with action syncDate.

step.title: Sync date
step.description: Stamp the dataset sync date after deployment.

definition.description: Runs the core metadata sync in one target transaction: FK NOCHECK, MERGE/DELETE from the compiled change set, re-enable FKs, commit.

step.title: Metadata sync
step.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected pipeline activity scope.

definition.description: POST to agent /pipeline/register for contract pipeline subject.

step.title: Pipeline register
step.description: Register the target pipeline with the agent service.
